Chilled Scythe  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 48
DMG: 23 Dmg Bonus: 162
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +4 DEX: +4 HP: +15 MANA: +20 ENDUR: +20
SV COLD: +20
Effect: Blast of Cold (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 33
WT: 1.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR SHD NEC BER
Race: ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Chilled Scythe
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 48
DMG: 23 Dmg Bonus: 162
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +4 DEX: +4 HP: +15 MANA: +20 ENDUR: +20
SV COLD: +20
Effect: Blast of Cold (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 33
WT: 1.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR SHD NEC BER
Race: ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Velium edged steel scythe
Item Type:2H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Agamenoar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 09:26:31
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 33
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Tower of Frozen Shadow
NPC Name
an enraged shadow beast


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Tower of Frozen Shadow


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Updated ?
QuoteReply
# May 15 2008 at 9:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1624839693639
1 post
Does anyone know if this item got updated to be used by drakkin? Would be nice hehe.
▲ Page top
Proc level
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2002 at 12:44 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966036421
67 posts
Was given one today for my Troll warrior. Just wondering what level it procs at?
▲ Page top
RE: Proc level
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2002 at 3:08 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593966036421
67 posts
Well, no one answered me, so I'll answer my own self. Just turned 33 today, and it started to proc. Don't remember if I used it at all at 32, but I believe, I did. That would mean that 33 is the level for the proc. Message looks something like this, (fighting Needlites) A Needlite is hit for 6 points of non melee damage.
A Needlites skin is frozen.
Kinda underwhelming, but at least now you know before you go out and buy one.

Maglorr 33 Troll Warrior of Rallos Zek, member of the Dark Affliction, Firiona Vie server.
Gilgaladd 26 Wood Elf Ranger of Tunare, Tunare server.

it looks real cool

QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2001 at 12:59 AM Rating: Default

Anonymous
Pretty un-fair that a gnome warrior of Rallos Zek can use this but not a Halfling War of Rallos Zek!
▲ Page top
The proc sucks
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2001 at 4:26 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It's an *8* damage cold based DD.

Forget about it.

My necro has one, I can hit critters with hit, provided they're level 1. I do 2 damage every 5 seconds. Duh.

The only use for this is for Vox raids. +20 Cold resist is nothing to sneeze at. Also note that it's very very light for a scythe: only 1.0 (Harvester is 8.0).
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2000 at 12:35 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum

Talked to a guide last night about the "Out of Charges" message. Had no reply for me except to just talk to a GM when you can find one and see about a weapon exchange.

__DEL__1591750438546

The Necromancer Epic Particle Weapon, contrary to another post, was a 1HB -- the Duck Stick: http://eqdb.allakhazam.com/item.html?item=2414

This is just another minor slip-up.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 10 2000 at 12:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I was wondering the same thing, but since they are giving that availability to them on this weapon they damn well BETTER change it and add HUM to that list!!!!
RE: Necro?
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2001 at 12:01 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
haven't checked all the RE: to this but there's no enraged cook it's enraged beast on 3rd floor enraged relative on 5. once in a while there's bugs that allow an aggroed mob to port floors. had the named zombie amonhomntep (whatever you spell the name as) spawn up to 7. he dropped somethin, didn't get to loot it but anyway. there's angry cook on 3 also. haven't seen that ugly wench drop anything but who cares. this place is a nightmare to the uninitiated. (i got initiated the hard way) but now it's smooth easy walkin through the place. and btw tserrina i am waiting for you still. you almost 100% mr tiny dark elf cur.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 09 2001 at 11:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
RE: Necro?
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2000 at 6:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245814955
37 posts
Necros don't have 2hs, but they have weapons that use skills that dont have. this item is really just for the warriors and shadowknights. The proc is quite good and makes it a really useful weapon, even though it drops on a pretty annoying part of the dungeon
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 10 2000 at 1:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Necro's DO have 2HS as the scythe off Lord Grimrot was prior the only 2HS necro's could use in game unless I am mistaken.
